title: [MTR/NTE]Taiwan 1435mm Railway track Pack
description: This is an MTR resource pack for various 1435mm rail systems in Taiwan.
body:
# 台灣1435mm軌道資源包
## 需要MTR和(A)NTE模組

### 內容物：
1. 台灣高鐵高架橋墩(1種)
2. 台灣高鐵軌道(14種)
3. 台北捷運軌道(2種)

### 建議：
- 台灣高鐵的軌道建議以5的倍數+1放置和大曲率，以免模型有斷層。
- 台北捷運第三軌建議以3的倍數放置和中等曲率，以免模型有斷層。

# Taiwan 1435mm Railway track Pack
## need MTR + (A)NTE mods

### Contents:
1. THSR Elevated bridge piers (1 type)
2. THSR Track(14 type)
3. TRTC Track(2種)

### Recommendations:
- THSR tracks: Best placed in multiples of 5+1 with large curvature to avoid model gaps.
- TRTC third-rail tracks: Best placed in multiples of 3 with medium curvature to avoid model gaps.

made by Tsukishima Heavy Industries,Ltd.
